Roots · Finance

Expense Report Submission

Enter your expense details below. When you submit, the tool builds a combined PDF — your report plus all receipts — then prepares the email to you and your manager.

Not saved yet

Employee details

Tell us who's submitting and what period this report covers.

Enter your name.
Select a function.
Enter exactly 3 numeric digits (e.g. 118).
Enter a valid email address.
Enter a valid email address.

Expense items

Add one row per expense. Choose Invoice for receipted costs or Mileage to claim kilometres. Each item totals automatically.

GL codes are filtered to your selected department. Choose Other (Please Specify) for a custom five-digit code. Mileage items are reimbursed at $0.50/km (no tax), with the GL locked to your department's Travel code and no receipts required.

Submit & send

Use the bar at the bottom of the screen to submit, download, or manage your draft — no need to scroll here. Prepare to Submit builds one combined PDF (report + receipts) and a pre-filled email to your manager for approval. On a computer it downloads the PDF so you can attach it to that email; on a phone it lets you pick your mail app to send it with the PDF attached. Your manager forwards it to Accounts Payable once approved.

Are you sure you want to clear form?

This removes all employee details, expense items, and attachments. It can't be undone.
